title: oxera coronata
intro: Oxera coronata, also known as the New Caledonian oxera, is a flowering plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Oxera coronata include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Oxera coronata can be prepared as an essential oil, tea, or infused in oil for medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy for human use.
